averagePricePaid.description: Average price paid, in instrument currency, per share.

createdAt.description: The ISO 8601 formatted date of when the position was opened.

currentPrice.description: Current price, in instrument currency, of a single share.

quantityAvailableForTrading.description: Quantity of shares available for trading.

quantityInPies.description: Quantity of shares currently used in pie.

walletImpact.description: Collects the financial impact of the position on the user's wallet.
